problem id: fecfb467
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(4) XOR SHL(5)

examples:
  10011111 -> 00011001
  11011100 -> 01001101
  00000011 -> 01010000
  11010001 -> 00111101
  11100111 -> 10011110
  11111010 -> 11101111
  01011110 -> 00100101
  10100100 -> 11001010
  11101001 -> 10111110
  10011101 -> 01111001

query: 11001110
predicted answer: 00101100
